text: fix issue that watchdog get's stuck in json parsing loop when API error
description:
this is the gemini agent API error (shown instead of valid JSON response): 

✕ [API Error: request to https://cloudcode-pa.googleapis.com/v1internal:streamGenerateContent?alt=sse failed, reason:
  C0B82D018C7F0000:error:0A0003FC:SSL routines:ssl3_read_bytes:ssl/tls alert bad record
  mac:../deps/openssl/openssl/ssl/record/rec_layer_s3.c:916:SSL alert number 20
  ]


this is the log output of the wrapped gemini process: 
[2025-12-22T12:44:44.373Z] [WatchdogService] Attempting to extract JSON...
[2025-12-22T12:44:44.374Z] [WatchdogService] JSON extraction/parsing failed: Error: No JSON closing brace found. Content length: 1099
[2025-12-22T12:44:45.372Z] [WatchdogService] Attempting to extract JSON...
[2025-12-22T12:44:45.372Z] [WatchdogService] JSON extraction/parsing failed: Error: No JSON closing brace found. Content length: 1099
[2025-12-22T12:44:46.375Z] [WatchdogService] Attempting to extract JSON...
[2025-12-22T12:44:46.375Z] [WatchdogService] JSON extraction/parsing failed: Error: No JSON closing brace found. Content length: 1099
[2025-12-22T12:44:47.374Z] [WatchdogService] Attempting to extract JSON...
[2025-12-22T12:44:47.374Z] [WatchdogService] JSON extraction/parsing failed: Error: No JSON closing brace found. Content length: 1099
[2025-12-22T12:44:48.377Z] [WatchdogService] Attempting to extract JSON...
[2025-12-22T12:44:48.377Z] [WatchdogService] JSON extraction/parsing failed: Error: No JSON closing brace found. Content length: 1099
[2025-12-22T12:44:49.375Z] [WatchdogService] Attempting to extract JSON...
[2025-12-22T12:44:49.376Z] [WatchdogService] JSON extraction/parsing failed: Error: No JSON closing brace found. Content length: 1099
[2025-12-22T12:44:50.379Z] [WatchdogService] Attempting to extract JSON...

status.comment: Implemented retry logic for JSON extraction failures in WatchdogService. This prevents the infinite loop when API errors occur, as retry() respects MAX_RETRIES limit.
